With Gemini 3, Google also is releasing Antigravity -- an AI coding platform that operates across the editor, terminal, and browser.

The differentiation from other AI coding tools is they're "reimagining the IDE from an agent-first perspective", not just another plugin

I've tried a ton of AI coding tools, and "The Real AI Engineer" (TRAE) is the latest one (and it's pretty awesome!)

You can build in two different modes:

• IDE Mode - For developers who want to keep control
• SOLO Mode - For people who want AI to take the lead

③ Native (should feel like a natural extension of Linear)
